flashcards.front: What is the purpose of Free Space Management?
flashcards.back: To track which disk blocks are free and available for allocation.
Simple and efficient for finding free/contiguous blocks.
Complexity in managing pointer blocks and variable group sizes.

flashcards.front: Stores runs of free blocks as (start_block, count) pairs.
flashcards.back: Stores runs of free blocks as (start_block, count) pairs.

flashcards.front: When is the Counting method most efficient?
flashcards.back: When blocks are allocated or freed in clustered patterns.
